name: FRACTALS OF DESTINY
short_description: FRACTALS OF DESTINY features new gameplay called Hybrid RPG, great visuals and epic story delivered by superhero female protagonist with unique combat style while exploring beautiful planets.
detailed_description:
FRACTALS OF DESTINY developed by KRAKATOA STUDIOS is an exhilarating hybrid RPG, which seamlessly combines the best features from Action RPGs with Classic RPGs. Prepare to embark on a thrilling adventure where the beloved turn-based system intertwines with breathtaking action sequences, creating a very accessible, captivating, and memorable gameplay experience. 

FRACTALS OF DESTINY offers a stimulating blend of action, strategy, and exploration, ensuring every moment is filled with excitement. You will play as Zerva, a superhero female protagonist with special cosmic power who seeks the truth and fights to change destiny. Find yourself immersed in a rich narrative-woven adventure with interconnected side quests, each intricately tied to the main storyline. Carefully follow the available clues to unveil hidden surprises along the journey.

The Toon shader (BETA) brings an Anime-realistic visual style to life with a dramatic and artistic presentation. It features stylized lighting, enhanced outlines on all characters, objects, and environments, and refined shading that will give you a comfortable feel, especially for those who enjoy fantasy-genre. Toon shader is now available in Major Update V2. 

Feel the best possible gaming experience on playing Fractals of Destiny, it might even give you ASMR while you play it.

STORY

The year is 5823, and the universe is ravaged by a cataclysmic war between the Velixar Azartus of the West Universe, led by the formidable Zeranos, and the Light Empire of the East Universe, commanded by the legendary Anum'Ra. This century-long conflict has left the universe on the brink of destruction, with the United Alliance unable to intervene due to dwindling troops and resources.

Amidst this chaos, a remarkable woman named Zerva emerges. Born of a unique heritage, she possesses extraordinary gifts that set her apart from ordinary people. She can only hope to win this battle by rising in rank, to become the greatest-known general of the United Alliance, bringing hope to the universe.

After the war, Zerva found love with her partner by the name of Eldran, and together they vowed to keep the peace.

However, destiny tells us a different story...

GAME FEATURES

Epic Storyline

Offering a rich and engaging narrative and character-driven quests, that immerse you in the game world.

Skill-based Progression

Providing a system that allows you to unlock and improve abilities and talents, alongside experience gain and character levelling. This offers deeper specialization and character customization.

Legendary Boss Fights

Prepare for heroic and challenging boss encounters with unique mechanics, phases and strategies to test your skill.

Semi-Open World Exploration

As you explore, find a vast and immersive world, filled with diverse landscapes, cities, and hidden secrets and dangers.

Crafting and Itemization

A robust crafting system is included, which features resource gathering and crafting of weapons, armor, potions, and other items which enhance your character's abilities and gear customization.

Character Customization

A wide range of options are available to customize your character's skills, abilities, and playstyle.

Sub-Mission System

A sub-mission system is implemented that complements the main storyline and contract missions, offering optional objectives, side quests, and additional explorable content.

Talent System

Create a build to suit YOUR unique playstyle on the battlefield.

Visual and Audio Immersion

Features stunning graphics, atmospheric sound design, and an epic soundtrack, which draw you into the game and enrich your overall experience.

Short FAQ

How long is Fractals of Destiny game duration?

  • Game duration varies depending on your playstyle, but on average, players will spend between 8 to 20 hours completing the main story and side missions (including all available content).

Does playing Fractals of Destiny require very high PC specifications?

  • No. To enjoy an optimal and smooth gaming experience, players can use a PC with medium to high specifications. For detailed specifications, please see the System Requirements section below or use higher specifications.

Does this game support controllers?

  • Yes, Fractals of Destiny fully supports controllers and can be customized according to your preferred play style.

Does Fractals of Destiny have multiplayer or online mode?

  • No. Fractals of Destiny is a single-player game focused on narrative and exploration.

Will the game continue to receive updates?

  • Yes. We are committed to providing regular maintenance to our game whether there's an issue or additional patches.

Where can I provide feedback or report bugs?

  • Please visit our community via our Discord server or email us at krakatoastudiosoffice@gmail.com.

Message from Developer :

We made Fractals of Destiny with love, passion, and full of dedication. As developers, we prioritize the player experience. Even though we are a very small team, we are committed to bringing this game to life and meaningful for everyone who plays it. Because for us, a game is not just a product. It's an art that deliver vision and stories.

supported_languages:
English*, German, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Indonesian, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian
*languages with full audio support
